name: Medieval Village Sandbox
description:
The same as my city sandbox bot but in the middle ages. A big town complete with a castle in the center for all of your rampaging needs! Another self-indulgent bot i've decided to make public for whatever reason. Very low token since its just a location you can do whatever you want in. An actual character with a decent token count is coming, I promise.

(It's gonna be the writer's explicitly advertised fetish im done screwin around)
creator: Background
